2603.28261.title: Coconstructions in spoken data: UD annotation guidelines and first results
2603.28261.paper_summary: The paper proposes annotation guidelines for syntactic dependencies that span across speaker turns - including collaborative coconstructions proper, wh-question answers, and backchannels - in spoken language treebanks within the Universal Dependencies framework. Two representations are proposed: a speaker-based representation following the segmentation into speech turns, and a dependency-based representation with dependencies across speech turns. New propositions are also put forward to distinguish between reformulations and repairs, and to promote elements in unfinished phrases.
2603.28261.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文提出了針對語法依賴的註釋指南，這些依賴跨越了說話者的回合——包括協作共同構建、wh-問題的回答和回應通道——在通用依賴框架下的口語語言樹庫中。<lb/>提出了兩種表示方式：一種是基於說話者的表示，遵循語音回合的分段，另一種是基於依賴的表示，具有跨語音回合的依賴關係。<lb/>還提出了新的提議，以區分重新表述和修正，並促進未完成短語中的元素。
2603.28261.author: Ludovica Pannitto et.al.
2603.28261.authors: Ludovica Pannitto, Sylvain Kahane, Kaja Dobrovoljc, Elena Battaglia, Bruno Guillaume, Caterina Mauri, Eleonora Zucchini
